title: Data Analyst
description:
Data Analyst

YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

Specialized in data visualization (reports), summary and interpretation of data and databased analysis of business processes
Works closely with data scientists, creates "big data" analyses and provides valuable insights from current business processes
Creates data visualizations (e.g. in SAC) and ensures that the analyses created are comprehensible and valid

YOUR PROFILE:

Experience in using data analytics tools (e.g. Athena or MySQL)
Strong skills in the creation of data visualizations
Basic knowledge of Python, SQL or R
Minimum 1 year of professional experience in the field of data science.

Interested?
If so, please use our online application tool to send your application to AVL!

About AVL

AVL is one of the world’s leading mobility technology companies for development, simulation and testing in the automotive industry, and beyond. We provide concepts, solutions and methodologies in fields like vehicle development and integration, e-mobility, automated and connected mobility (ADAS/AD), and software for a greener, safer, better world of mobility.

Find out more: www.avl.com
